title: Form trigger page not loading due to incorrect webhook URL
symptom: The form trigger in the self-hosted n8n instance fails to load, showing a blank page or failing to load entirely.
root_cause: The issue arises from using the incorrect environment variable for the webhook URL. The documentation specifies 'WEBHOOK_URL', but the user is using 'N8N_WEBHOOK_URL', which may not be recognized by the system.
agent_instruction: Update the webhook URL variable in your n8n configuration and restart the instance.
